member.name: T:WorkoutLogg.Data.CategoryRepository
member.summary: Repository class for managing categories in the database.

member.name: M:WorkoutLogg.Data.CategoryRepository.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{WorkoutLogg.Data.CategoryRepository})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The logger instance.

member.name: M:WorkoutLogg.Data.CategoryRepository.Init
member.summary: Initializes the database connection and creates the Category table if it does not exist.

member.name: M:WorkoutLogg.Data.CategoryRepository.ListAsync
member.summary: Retrieves a list of all categories from the database.
member.returns: A list of objects.

member.name: M:WorkoutLogg.Data.CategoryRepository.GetAsync(System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieves a specific category by its ID.
member.param: The ID of the category.
member.returns: A object if found; otherwise, null.

member.name: M:WorkoutLogg.Data.CategoryRepository.SaveItemAsync(WorkoutLogg.Models.Category)
member.summary: Saves a category to the database. If the category ID is 0, a new category is created; otherwise, the existing category is updated.
member.param: The category to save.
member.returns: The ID of the saved category.

member.name: M:WorkoutLogg.Data.CategoryRepository.DeleteItemAsync(WorkoutLogg.Models.Category)
member.summary: Deletes a category from the database.
member.param: The category to delete.
member.returns: The number of rows affected.

member.name: M:WorkoutLogg.Data.CategoryRepository.DropTableAsync
member.summary: Drops the Category table from the database.

member.name: T:WorkoutLogg.Data.ProjectRepository
member.summary: Repository class for managing projects in the database.

member.name: M:WorkoutLogg.Data.ProjectRepository.#ctor(WorkoutLogg.Data.TaskRepository,WorkoutLogg.Data.TagRepository,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{WorkoutLogg.Data.ProjectRepository})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The task repository instance.
The tag repository instance.
The logger instance.

member.name: M:WorkoutLogg.Data.ProjectRepository.Init
member.summary: Initializes the database connection and creates the Project table if it does not exist.

member.name: M:WorkoutLogg.Data.ProjectRepository.ListAsync
member.summary: Retrieves a list of all projects from the database.
member.returns: A list of objects.

member.name: M:WorkoutLogg.Data.ProjectRepository.GetAsync(System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieves a specific project by its ID.
member.param: The ID of the project.
member.returns: A object if found; otherwise, null.

member.name: M:WorkoutLogg.Data.ProjectRepository.SaveItemAsync(WorkoutLogg.Models.Project)
member.summary: Saves a project to the database. If the project ID is 0, a new project is created; otherwise, the existing project is updated.
member.param: The project to save.
member.returns: The ID of the saved project.

member.name: M:WorkoutLogg.Data.ProjectRepository.DeleteItemAsync(WorkoutLogg.Models.Project)
member.summary: Deletes a project from the database.
member.param: The project to delete.
member.returns: The number of rows affected.

member.name: M:WorkoutLogg.Data.ProjectRepository.DropTableAsync
member.summary: Drops the Project table from the database.

member.name: T:WorkoutLogg.Data.TagRepository
member.summary: Repository class for managing tags in the database.

member.name: M:WorkoutLogg.Data.TagRepository.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{WorkoutLogg.Data.TagRepository})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The logger instance.

member.name: M:WorkoutLogg.Data.TagRepository.Init
member.summary: Initializes the database connection and creates the Tag and ProjectsTags tables if they do not exist.

member.name: M:WorkoutLogg.Data.TagRepository.ListAsync
member.summary: Retrieves a list of all tags from the database.
member.returns: A list of objects.

member.name: M:WorkoutLogg.Data.TagRepository.ListAsync(System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieves a list of tags associated with a specific project.
member.param: The ID of the project.
member.returns: A list of objects.

member.name: M:WorkoutLogg.Data.TagRepository.GetAsync(System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieves a specific tag by its ID.
member.param: The ID of the tag.
member.returns: A object if found; otherwise, null.

member.name: M:WorkoutLogg.Data.TagRepository.SaveItemAsync(WorkoutLogg.Models.Tag)
member.summary: Saves a tag to the database. If the tag ID is 0, a new tag is created; otherwise, the existing tag is updated.
member.param: The tag to save.
member.returns: The ID of the saved tag.

member.name: M:WorkoutLogg.Data.TagRepository.SaveItemAsync(WorkoutLogg.Models.Tag,System.Int32)
member.summary: Saves a tag to the database and associates it with a specific project.
member.param: The tag to save.
The ID of the project.
member.returns: The number of rows affected.

member.name: M:WorkoutLogg.Data.TagRepository.IsAssociated(WorkoutLogg.Models.Tag,System.Int32)
member.summary: Checks if a tag is already associated with a specific project.
member.param: The tag to save.
The ID of the project.
member.returns: If tag is already associated with this project

member.name: M:WorkoutLogg.Data.TagRepository.DeleteItemAsync(WorkoutLogg.Models.Tag)
member.summary: Deletes a tag from the database.
member.param: The tag to delete.
member.returns: The number of rows affected.

member.name: M:WorkoutLogg.Data.TagRepository.DeleteItemAsync(WorkoutLogg.Models.Tag,System.Int32)
member.summary: Deletes a tag from a specific project in the database.
member.param: The tag to delete.
The ID of the project.
member.returns: The number of rows affected.

member.name: M:WorkoutLogg.Data.TagRepository.DropTableAsync
member.summary: Drops the Tag and ProjectsTags tables from the database.

member.name: T:WorkoutLogg.Data.TaskRepository
member.summary: Repository class for managing tasks in the database.

member.name: M:WorkoutLogg.Data.TaskRepository.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{WorkoutLogg.Data.TaskRepository})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The logger instance.

member.name: M:WorkoutLogg.Data.TaskRepository.Init
member.summary: Initializes the database connection and creates the Task table if it does not exist.

member.name: M:WorkoutLogg.Data.TaskRepository.ListAsync
member.summary: Retrieves a list of all tasks from the database.
member.returns: A list of objects.

member.name: M:WorkoutLogg.Data.TaskRepository.ListAsync(System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieves a list of tasks associated with a specific project.
member.param: The ID of the project.
member.returns: A list of objects.

member.name: M:WorkoutLogg.Data.TaskRepository.GetAsync(System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieves a specific task by its ID.
member.param: The ID of the task.
member.returns: A object if found; otherwise, null.

member.name: M:WorkoutLogg.Data.TaskRepository.SaveItemAsync(WorkoutLogg.Models.ProjectTask)
member.summary: Saves a task to the database. If the task ID is 0, a new task is created; otherwise, the existing task is updated.
member.param: The task to save.
member.returns: The ID of the saved task.

member.name: M:WorkoutLogg.Data.TaskRepository.DeleteItemAsync(WorkoutLogg.Models.ProjectTask)
member.summary: Deletes a task from the database.
member.param: The task to delete.
member.returns: The number of rows affected.

member.name: M:WorkoutLogg.Data.TaskRepository.DropTableAsync
member.summary: Drops the Task table from the database.

member.name: T:WorkoutLogg.Localization.Loc
member.summary: Static accessor — initialized once from MauiProgram after DI build.

member.name: M:WorkoutLogg.Localization.Loc.Get(System.String)
member.summary: Returns the translated string for , or the key itself if missing.

member.name: T:WorkoutLogg.Localization.TranslateExtension
member.summary: XAML markup extension: Text="{loc:Translate Dashboard_Title}" Reads the value at XAML inflation time — the shell is reloaded on language change so all markup extensions re-evaluate automatically.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Maui.Controls.ColorAnimationExtensions_Button.TextColorTo(Microsoft.Maui.Controls.Button,Microsoft.Maui.Graphics.Color,System.UInt32,System.UInt32,Microsoft.Maui.Easing,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Animates the TextColor of an to the given color
member.param: The target color to animate the to
The time, in milliseconds, between the frames of the animation
The duration, in milliseconds, of the animation
The easing function to be used in the animation
member.returns: Value indicating if the animation completed successfully or not
